task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the client system report JSON file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal (e.g., cat, less), or Python script displaying the contents of /home/ga/client_system_report.json.

task_completion.description: Agent launches the System Advisor Model (SAM) application or sets up a PySAM script.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SAM (System Advisor Model) GUI window is open, or a code editor shows a Python script importing and initializing PySAM modules.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the simulation for Las Vegas weather data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SAM GUI, the 'Location and Resource' page shows Las Vegas selected, or in a script, weather file parameters or coordinates (Lat: 36.17, Lon: -115.14) are being set.

task_completion.description: Agent sets up and executes the parameter sweep for the 42 combinations of soiling and degradation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SAM's 'Parametric' simulation window showing the specific arrays of soiling [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12] and degradation [0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 0.9, 1.1, 1.3, 1.5], or a script containing nested loops iterating over these exact values and running the simulation.

task_completion.description: Agent identifies the correct combination of soiling and degradation that best matches the Year 4 production.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A final results table, script output, or text file explicitly concluding that the best fit is 8.0% soiling loss and 0.9% annual degradation (which matches the ~35,290 kWh observed production).

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually ran the SAM simulation rather than just printing the expected answer.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for SAM simulation progress bars, a populated parametric results table in the SAM GUI, or terminal output showing the execution of the 42 simulation runs.

integrity.description: Verify the agent evaluated multiple combinations, not just the correct one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results table or script output should display production values for various incorrect combinations (e.g., 2% soiling, 0.3% degradation) alongside the correct one.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not hardcode the final answer without deriving it.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final answer (8.0% soiling, 0.9% degradation) must logically follow from a comparison of the simulation outputs against the target 35,290 kWh, rather than appearing out of nowhere in a text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The ground truth best-fit combination is 8.0% soiling loss and 0.9% annual degradation. The observed Year 4 production to match is 35,290 kWh. The parameter sweep must evaluate exactly 42 combinations (6 soiling rates x 7 degradation rates). The site location is Las Vegas, NV (Lat: 36.17, Lon: -115.14).
